title: 10 best herbal capsules for stomach growling
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for stomach growling are natural supplements designed to alleviate persistent and embarrassing digestive issues. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbs, such as ginger, chamomile, and peppermint, which work together to calm the stomach and reduce discomforting sounds. By soothing the digestive tract, these herbal capsules can help quiet stomach growls and alleviate feelings of anxiety and embarrassment associated with this condition. Examples include products like Gaia Herbs' Stomach Soothe Capsules and Nature's Way Senna Leaf Extract Capsules, which have helped many individuals regain confidence in their daily lives by reducing unwanted sounds and improving overall digestive health.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain the herb Glycyrrhizin, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties. When consumed as a supplement, it can help to soothe and calm an irritated digestive tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort that can lead to stomach growling. Additionally, Licorice root has been shown to increase mucus production in the stomach, helping to protect the lining of the digestive system and reduce symptoms of indigestion and heartburn.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Licorice root contains compounds like glycyrrhizin, which helps reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating symptoms of stomach growling and discomfort.
Soothing properties: The saponins present in licorice root have a calming effect on the mucous membranes in the stomach, helping to soothe irritation, reduce acid reflux, and quiet stomach growling.

Digestive enzymes support: Licorice root extract has been shown to stimulate digestive enzyme production, which can help break down food more efficiently, reducing discomfort and alleviating symptoms of stomach growling.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps soothe digestive issues and reduces inflammation, making them effective against stomach growling.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and saponins, the barks help calm the stomach lining, reducing irritability and discomfort associated with stomach growling.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 200 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root powder and sift it through a fine-mesh sieve.
Combine the sifting process with mixing in 100 grams of starch powder for better binding properties.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the powdered mixture per capsule.
Seal the filled capsules using a capsule filling machine or manual capsule filler for precise dosing control.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain compounds that stimulate digestive enzymes, reducing bloating and gas. The active ingredients in fennel, such as anethole and fenchol, have a natural anti-inflammatory effect on the digestive tract, soothing irritations and discomfort. By promoting healthy digestion and gut motility, fennel capsules can alleviate stomach growling and reduce feelings of hunger and discomfort.
remedy_properties: Carminative property: Fennel's carminative property helps to reduce digestive discomfort and relieve bloating, which can alleviate stomach growling by reducing gas and flatulence.

Antispasmodic property: The antispasmodic properties of fennel capsules help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, which can calm spasms and reduce cramping that may contribute to stomach growling.

Gastroprotective property: Fennel's gastroprotective properties help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the stomach, reducing inflammation and irritation that may cause stomach growling and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots have a calming effect on the digestive system, making them an effective ingredient in capsules to alleviate stomach growling and discomfort.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain oils that help to reduce inflammation and spasms in the digestive tract, providing relief from stomach growling and cramps.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of dried foeniculum vulgare seeds and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the ground foeniculum vulgare powder with 100 grams of gelatin in a bowl until a uniform mixture is achieved after 5 minutes.
Add 250 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and stir until it forms a homogeneous paste that can be easily filled into capsules within 15 minutes.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with approximately 500 milligrams of the foeniculum vulgare-gelatin mixture, sealing each capsule securely after 5 minutes.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate them for extended shelf life after preparation is complete within 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass capsules helps with stomach growling because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The capsules contain citral, a compound that soothes the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and irritation that can cause stomach discomfort. Additionally, lemongrass has a calming effect on the muscles in the gastrointestinal tract, helping to relax and ease any spasms or contractions that may be contributing to growling. As a result, lemongrass capsules can provide quick relief from stomach growling and help promote a sense of digestive balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Lemongrass capsules contain compounds like citral and geraniol, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help soothe an upset stomach and reduce inflammation that may be contributing to stomach growling.

Digestive enzymes stimulant properties: Lemongrass contains digestive enzymes like amylase and lipase that stimulate digestion, reducing the likelihood of stomach discomfort, bloating, and growling by facilitating proper nutrient absorption and waste elimination.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in lemongrass capsules help protect the gut lining from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to stomach upset, cramps, and growling.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes are rich in fiber and antioxidants, making them effective in soothing digestive issues like stomach growling.
Roots: Lemongrass roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, alleviating stomach discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cymbopogon citratus leaves from your garden or purchase dried leaves from a reputable supplier.
Dry the harvested leaves using a food dehydrator on low heat for 24 hours or air drying for 3-5 days.
Crush 20g of dried cymbopogon citratus leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered cymbopogon citratus with 100mg of silica gel and 500mg of starch in a clean glass container.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture, sealing each capsule tightly and storing them in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain natural anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and calm the digestive system. When taken before meals, ginger capsules can help reduce hunger pangs and alleviate bloating, gas, and indigestion, which are common causes of stomach growling. Additionally, ginger's carminative properties can help ease spasms in the digestive tract, allowing food to move more smoothly through the body and reducing discomfort. As a result, herbal ginger capsules can provide quick relief from stomach growling and promote overall digestive health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to stomach growling and discomfort. This reduces irritation and helps soothe the stomach lining.

Digestive stimulant property: Ginger stimulates digestion and improves gut motility, helping food move through the digestive system more efficiently, which can alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating that may cause stomach growling.
Antispasmodic property: The antispasmodic compounds in ginger help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and cramps that can contribute to stomach growling and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have natural anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm stomach discomfort.
Roots: Containing a high concentration of gingerol and its derivatives, the roots of the ginger plant are traditionally used to alleviate nausea, indigestion, and other gastrointestinal issues.
remedy_recipe: Collect 250 grams of dried ginger root and grind it into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered ginger with 500 milligrams of calcium carbonate and 100 milligrams of magnesium citrate in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with one-quarter teaspoon of the ginger mixture, depending on the size of your capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer storage.
Take two capsules with water three times daily before meals for optimal relief from stomach growling symptoms within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain a natural soothing agent that calms down digestive issues. The menthol in peppermint has a calming effect on the muscles in the stomach, which can help to slow down digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. This, in turn, reduces the likelihood of stomach contractions that cause rumbling or growling sounds. By soothing the stomach and reducing digestive discomfort, peppermint capsules provide relief from embarrassing and uncomfortable stomach noises.
remedy_properties: Irritant effect: Peppermint's menthol content can irritate the stomach lining, which helps to stimulate digestion and reduce feelings of hunger and discomfort by increasing blood flow and digestive enzymes.

Antispasmodic properties: Peppermint's active compounds, such as menthol and methyl salicylate, relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and cramps that can contribute to stomach growling and discomfort.

Carminative effect: Peppermint oil has a carminative action, which helps to eliminate gas and reduce bloating by relaxing the abdominal muscles and promoting the release of trapped gases from the digestive system.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in essential oils and phenolic compounds, which provide anti-inflammatory and digestive benefits to alleviate stomach growling.
Rhyzomes: Contain menthol and menthone, which have natural analgesic and antispasmodic properties that help soothe stomach cramps and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality peppermint leaves fresh from the garden in the early morning hours.
Dry the freshly harvested peppermint leaves in a single layer on paper towels for three days.
Crush the dried peppermint leaves into small pieces using a mortar and pestle to release essential oils.
Mix 200 grams of crushed peppermint leaves with 400 milliliters of glycerin in a glass jar overnight.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the peppermint-glycerin mixture and store in an airtight container.

remedy_recipe: Harvest triticum aestivum seeds of high-quality from a reputable source for optimal potency.
Clean the harvested seeds thoroughly by hand or machine to remove impurities and debris.
Dry the cleaned seeds in a warm place with low humidity for 24-48 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind 1000mg of dried triticum aestivum seeds into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for uniform mixture.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared powder and seal immediately to maintain potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain natural anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe the digestive tract, reducing irritation and discomfort. remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots weighing approximately 200 grams for drying and processing.
Dry the harvested roots in a warm oven at 60°c for 24 hours or until completely dry.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Mix one part of the powdered root with two parts of pure gelatin to create a uniform blend according to traditional herbalist guidelines.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 200-250 milligrams of the blended mixture and seal immediately.

Mix the ground powder with 10g of glycerin and 5g of distilled water for 15 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the mixture, yielding approximately 100 capsules.

remedy_recipe: Measure out one hundred grams of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine one teaspoon of the powdered matricaria chamomilla with one tablespoon of gelatin in a small bowl.
Add four ounces of boiling water to the bowl and allow the mixture to steep for five minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the cooled liquid extract and store them in an airtight container.

remedy_recipe: Harvest dried piper nigrum seeds from a reputable source according to quality standards.
Weigh out 250 milligrams of piper nigrum powder and mix it with 500 milliliters of distilled water.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 75 degrees celsius for 30 minutes stirring occasionally.
Filter the solution using a coffee filter or cheesecloth into a clean glass bottle preserving the extract.
Fill empty capsules with 250 milligrams of the piper nigrum extract and store them in an airtight container.

Mix one part coriandrum sativum powder with two parts vegetable capsule filler and store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture, making sure each capsule contains 400mg of coriandrum sativum powder, and seal tightly.
Store the filled capsules in a cool, dry place for up to 2 years or until needed, and take two capsules daily as needed to alleviate stomach growling symptoms.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 200 grams of fresh onion bulbs allium cepa and wash them thoroughly under cold running water.
Chop the onions into small pieces and dry them in a low-temperature oven at 50°c for 12 hours.
Combine 100 grams of dried onion powder with 500 milliliters of boiling distilled water to create an infusion.
Steep the mixture for 30 minutes before straining it through a cheesecloth or coffee filter and discard solids.

remedy_recipe: Gather 100g of dried aloe vera leaves and 500ml of water for the initial preparation.
Soak the dried aloe vera leaves in cold water for 4 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
Blend the soaked aloe vera leaves with 250ml of water to create a pulp-like mixture and filter it through a cheesecloth.
Mix 10g of the filtered aloe vera extract with 90g of gelatin capsules and fill them using an automatic capsule filler machine.
Store the herbal aloe vera capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

Cineole: Cineole, a monoterpene compound also found in turmeric, possesses carminative and anti-flatulent properties, helping to ease gas, bloating, and discomfort that can contribute to stomach growling.

remedy_recipe: Grind 2 teaspoons of dried turmeric powder into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar pestle.
Mix the ground turmeric with 500 mg of gelatin and 100mg of glycerin in a bowl.
Add 50ml of distilled water to the mixture and stir until it forms a uniform paste.
Fill empty capsules with about 250-300mg of the turmeric-gelatin-glycerin paste using a capsule filler machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate them for longer shelf life.

remedy_properties: Sedative and anti-anxiety effects: Valerian root has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce feelings of anxiety and stress that can contribute to stomach growling.

Gastroprotective properties: Valerian has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects in the digestive tract, which can help to soothe and protect the stomach lining from irritation and inflammation that can cause discomfort and growling.

Carminative and antispasmodic effects: Valerian's carminative properties can help to reduce gas and bloating, while its antispasmodic effects can alleviate cramps and spasms in the digestive tract that can contribute to stomach growling.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in valerenic acid, which helps to soothe digestive issues and alleviate stomach discomfort.
Rhyzomes: Contains a significant amount of valepotriates, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce stomach inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried valerian root valeriana officinalis weighing 100g and grind it into fine powder using a spice grinder.
Combine the powdered valerian root with 400ml of vodka in a glass jar, sealing it tightly and allowing it to steep for 4-6 weeks.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another container, discarding the solids and preserving the infused tincture.
Mix 20g of the valerian root tincture with 80g of gelatin capsules, filling each capsule to avoid air pockets.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese peony capsules helps with stomach growling because they possess a unique combination of properties that soothe and calm the digestive system. The herb peony root, used in these capsules, has been traditionally used to relieve gastrointestinal issues such as indigestion and bloating. Its ability to relax the muscles in the digestive tract helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate cramping, effectively silencing stomach growling. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help to calm digestive discomfort, promoting a smoother digestion process.
remedy_properties: Digestive Enzyme Regulation: Chinese Peony capsules contain enzymes that regulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion, including stomach growling, by breaking down proteins, carbohydrates, and fats into easily absorbed nutrients.

Anti-inflammatory Activity: The herb has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract, which is often a contributing factor to stomach growling and other digestive discomforts.

Antispasmodic Effect: Chinese Peony capsules have antispasmodic properties that can help relax the muscles of the digestive tract, reducing spasms and cramps that can cause stomach growling, bloating, and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Chinese Peony plant have been shown to have a calming effect on the digestive system, making them an effective treatment for stomach growling.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the plant contain compounds that help to soothe and regulate digestion, reducing symptoms of stomach growling and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1000 grams of dried paeonia lactiflora root and grind it into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 200 grams of the powdered paeonia lactiflora root with 400 grams of tapioca starch in a large bowl.
Add 100 milliliters of distilled water to the mixture and stir until it forms a uniform paste.
Fill #0 capsules with 300 milligrams of the powder mixture and seal the capsules using a capsule machine or cellophane bags.
Store the capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months, or refrigerate for up to 1 year before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sesame capsules helps with stomach growling because they contain sesamin, a natural compound that soothes and calms the digestive system. Sesame oil has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and gas, which can often manifest as stomach growling. The capsule's active ingredients work to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, allowing for a smoother transition of food through the gut. As a result, sesame capsules can help to quiet persistent stomach growling and promote overall digestive health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Sesame capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe digestive issues, including stomach growling, by reducing inflammation in the digestive tract.
Prebiotic fiber: Sesame contains prebiotic fiber, which helps promote the growth of beneficial gut bacteria, improving digestion and reducing symptoms like stomach growling, bloating, and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: Sesame capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the digestive system from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to stomach growling and other digestive issues.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sesame roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm digestive issues, making them effective in reducing stomach growling.
Barks: The barks of the sesame plant have been traditionally used to treat various digestive problems, including stomach growling, due to their ability to relax the muscles in the digestive tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest sesamum indicum seeds from healthy plants grown in well-draining soil for at least 120 days.
Dry the harvested seeds in a warm, dry place or using a food dehydrator set at 70°f for 24 hours.
Grind dried sesamum indicum seeds into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix 1 tablespoon of ground sesamum indicum with 2 tablespoons of gelatin in a small bowl, stirring until well combined and setting at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Fill empty #0 capsules with the mixture from step 4, using a capsule filler or spoon to fill each capsule to capacity within 10 minutes.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat stomach growling with herbal capsules is by using a combination of calming herbs such as peppermint, ginger, and chamomile. These herbs work together to soothe the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and ease digestive discomfort. Additionally, taking probiotic-rich supplements can help restore the balance of gut bacteria and alleviate symptoms of bloating and gas. Regular consumption of these herbal capsules can provide long-term relief from stomach growling.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to stomach growling that are treated with herbal capsules are digestive issues such as bloating, gas, and indigestion. Herbal remedies like peppermint, ginger, and fennel have natural anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe the digestive system and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Additionally, herbal capsules containing licorice root, chamomile, and turmeric may also be used to treat stomach discomfort, heartburn, and acid reflux.
